reasoning: The control 1.2.7 focuses on reviewing configurations to ensure that resources are not publicly accessible and are properly secured. In Kubernetes, this can be mapped to ensuring that network policies are in place to deny all ingress and egress traffic by default, unless explicitly allowed. Additionally, services should not be exposed using NodePort, which can make them publicly accessible. Ingress resources should have TLS enabled to secure traffic.
title: is met by reviewing those configurations as specified in the requirement
